# Price Match Eligibility

Acme Shop matches a lower advertised price on an identical in-stock product from a short list of approved major retailers. The competing product must be sold and shipped by the retailer directly rather than a third-party marketplace seller, and the lower price must be available to the general public rather than a members-only or clearance price.

[Source: price_matching.md#price-match-eligibility]
